output.summary: NaiveBaseline kept intact while env-vars crank Muon momentum, halve LRs, 3× MLP, 2048-token training, grad clip, and train-on-val for better quantized convergence.
output.valOnlyReasoning: TRAIN_ON_VAL=1 switches training to include validation shards per organizer-approved setup.
techniques: Muon optimizer tuning with 0.99 momentum and extended warmdown
Expanded MLP multiplier to 3× within baseline parameter budget
2048-token sequences with 0.3 grad clipping for stable longer-context training
